         spf(i) = i

         for (j <- i * 2 to max_num by i) {

            if (spf(j) == 0L) spf(j) = i

         }

      }

   }

   // build prime_to_indices map

   val prime_to_indices = scala.collection.mutable.HashMap[Long, List[Long]]()

   val n = nums.length

   for (i <- 0 until n) {

      val x = nums(i)

   val visited = Array.fill(n)(false)

   val queue = mutable.Queue[Int]()

   visited(0) = true

   var steps = 0

         }

      }

   }

}
